summary: Comprehensive testing of TruDerm luxury dermatology clinic website completed. Backend API and frontend UI working well with successful appointment booking integration.

minor_bugs.issue: Input validation not rejecting empty required fields
minor_bugs.impact: Should return 400/422 for empty fields but returns 200

cosmetic_issues.issue: URL fragments not updating during smooth scroll navigation

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, about, services, why choose, testimonials, ratings, treatments, contact, footer)
Navbar with all 5 links and Book Appointment button
Hero section with TruDerm branding, gold shimmer, tagline, and CTAs
About section with doctor image and credentials
Ratings bar shows Google 4.9, Justdial 4.8, Yappe 4.9
Contact section with Google Maps and contact details
Footer with quick links and Instagram
Appointment modal opens with all form fields
Form submission works with backend integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor backend validation improvement needed: Add input validation to reject empty required fields in appointment creation

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality works, minor cosmetic issues)
